# Environment for the CosyVoice2 backbone (extraction + synthesis stages).
#
# CosyVoice2 cannot share an environment with IndexTTS2; use a dedicated env.
#
# --- HPC modules (Spartan / similar) ---
#   module load Anaconda3/2024.02-1
#   module load CUDA/12.4.1
#   module load cuDNN/9.6.0.74-CUDA-12.4.1
#
# --- create the env ---
#   conda create -n cocoemo_cv2 python=3.10 -y
#   conda activate cocoemo_cv2
#   pip install -r env/cosyvoice2.txt
#
# Then clone CosyVoice and point COSYVOICE_ROOT at it:
#   git clone https://github.com/FunAudioLLM/CosyVoice
#   export COSYVOICE_ROOT=/abs/path/to/CosyVoice   # adds it + Matcha-TTS to sys.path
# and download the CosyVoice2-0.5B checkpoint (pass as --model-dir).
#
# IMPORTANT: transformers MUST be 4.51.x. Newer majors (5.x) load the Qwen2 SLM in
# mixed bf16/fp32 and break CosyVoice2 generation (Float vs BFloat16 in q_proj).

torch==2.6.0
torchaudio==2.6.0
transformers==4.51.3      # pinned: 5.x breaks CosyVoice2's Qwen2 LM dtype
tokenizers>=0.21,<0.22    # required by transformers 4.51.3
huggingface-hub>=0.30,<1.0
numpy>=1.26,<2.3
scipy==1.15.3
scikit-learn==1.7.2
pandas==2.3.3
tqdm==4.67.3
HyperPyYAML==1.2.3
librosa==0.10.2
soundfile==0.12.1
onnxruntime-gpu==1.23.2
modelscope==1.20.0
matplotlib==3.10.9        # only needed for plotting scripts
seaborn==0.13.2           # only needed for plotting scripts

# CosyVoice itself is installed from its own repo (COSYVOICE_ROOT), not via pip.
# See https://github.com/FunAudioLLM/CosyVoice for its full requirements.
